properties.od: Soura ↔ Maisuma / Lal Chowk (central Srinagar) via Munawar Abad and the old city — the N–S city spine. Busiest corridor in the dataset.
Soura ↔ Nowshera via Lal Bazar (NE old-city Srinagar), with an eastern arm toward Nishat/Harwan that partly follows the SSCL Parimpora–Harwan e-bus alignment.
properties.matched_permit: Parimpora to Harwan via Brein Nishat

properties.od: Udhampur ↔ Chenani on NH-44 (Chenani–Nashri / Dr. S.P. Mookerjee tunnel corridor), Udhampur district — JAMMU division.
Soura ↔ Nowgam (Srinagar railway station) via Dal Gate / Munawar Abad. A north–south city route.
Pampore (Pulwama) ↔ Sonwar Bagh / central Srinagar, via Pantha Chowk. A Pampore–Srinagar corridor on the SE approach.
Magarmal Bagh / central Srinagar ↔ Pampore (Pulwama) via Lasjan and Pantha Chowk.
Nawa Kadal / Qamarwari (NW Srinagar) ↔ Zoonimar (near Soura, N Srinagar). A NW–N city cross-route.
Magarmal Bagh / Jehangir Chowk ↔ Safa Kadal via Karan Nagar. A short central-Srinagar route.
Nowshera ↔ Ellahibagh via Lal Bazar (NE Srinagar). A short local corridor in the same NE cluster as C2.
properties.matched_permit: Parimpora to Harwan via Brein Nishat

properties.od: Batote ↔ Mera on NH-44 via Baglihar, Ramban district — JAMMU division (Srinagar–Jammu highway).
Zoonimar ↔ Gulab Bagh via Lal Bazar (N/NE Srinagar). Third corridor in the NE-Srinagar local cluster (C2, C9, C11).
properties.matched_permit: Parimpora to Harwan via Brein Nishat

properties.od: Nowhatta (old city) ↔ Karan Nagar (SMHS / Medical College area) via Chotta Bazar / Medical College Road. Short central hospital-access corridor.
properties.matched_permit: Batamaloo to Womens College Batpora via Rainawari

properties.od: Karan Nagar ↔ Nawa Kadal via Noor Bagh (NW Srinagar, Qamarwari area).
Batamaloo (main Srinagar terminal) ↔ Budgam / Badgam (Budgam district HQ) via Peerbagh.
Rambagh (SW-central Srinagar) ↔ Ellahibagh (NE) via Rainawari — a long cross-city diagonal along the Dal-east side.
Magarmal Bagh / Jehangir Chowk (central Srinagar) ↔ Narbal (Budgam, on Gulmarg Road) via Qamarwari.
Short (3.3 km) near-stationary activity around the Pampore terminal (both endpoints within ~1.4 km of Pampore; the 'Srinagar' geocode is a mislabel of a point next to Pampore).
Sadrebal ↔ Gulab Bagh via Nowshera (N/NE Srinagar). Part of the NE-Srinagar local cluster.
